approved_by: human governance decision following approved W13 execution plan

input_snapshot.algorithm: sha256 over sorted per-file sha256 digests (excluding .DS_Store)

local_decisions_finalized.choice: ci.yml on push/PR to main; build-local.yml on push to main and workflow_dispatch; build-staging.yml on push to main/release/* and workflow_dispatch.
build-local and build-staging skip the EAS step unless EAS_ACCESS_TOKEN is configured.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: Keeps CI green before Play Console / EAS credentials are available.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: ci.yml uploads package dist directories; build-local/build-staging upload APK artifacts when credentials are present.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: Provides build outputs without requiring store credentials.

exclusions: No live CI run triggered or validated with act.
No EAS credentials configured; EAS build steps are no-ops until secrets are added.
No changes to knowledge/ during execution.
